issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed www.finefoodspecialist.co.uk and found 2 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
